case_title: TYREE JOHNSON VS. THE QUAKER OATS COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TYREE JOHNSON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE QUAKER OATS COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TARGET CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED LADREUS DEMILIO (EXECUTIVE TEAM LEAD - ASSETS PROTECTION). NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE CT CORPORATION SERVICE]; (**SEE SIGNATURE SECTION** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED AUG-18-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE QUAKER OATS COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LADREUS DEMILIO (EXECUTIVE TEAM LEAD - ASSETS PROTECTION) FILED BY DEFENDANT TARGET CORPORATION

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, TYREE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, TYREE AS TO DEFENDANT TARGET CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2023 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-09-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. KANE (D. 506)
